label: Qilowatt mFRR Override
info:
Cerbo-only Qilowatt mFRR override.

Inputs come from qw_agent.py via the local MQTT broker (qw/qw_source, qw/qw_mode, qw/qw_powerlimit, qw/qw_connected). The state machine drives /data/qw_*.sh actuators and exposes a global.qw_mfrr flag so a co-resident curtailment flow can become mFRR-aware (see curtailment-mfrr-aware.md).

Imported disabled — enable only after the agent and actuators are verified.

name: MQTT INPUT — qw_* from qw_agent.py
info: qw_agent.py publishes retained qw/qw_source, qw/qw_mode, qw/qw_powerlimit, qw/qw_connected. Retain=true means NR gets the last known state immediately on start.

name: set qw_source
set qw_mode
set qw_powerlimit
set qw_connected
DECIDE — state machine (IDLE / ACTIVE)
info: trig_decide debounces MQTT changes (500ms) and triggers state_fn. poll_10s is a backup tick so failsafes (mqtt_lost, max_duration) run even when MQTT is quiet.

name: QW state machine
EXEC — /data/qw_*.sh actuators
ack dess_toggle
stderr dess_toggle
ack setpoint
stderr setpoint
rc check
TEST — manual mFRR simulations
info:
Test inject buttons bypass state_fn and call the exec actuators directly in sequence: dess off -> setpoint W -> (duration) -> setpoint 0 -> dess on.

WARNING: do not run during a real mFRR event (qw_source = fusebox/kratt) — race with state_fn.

name: Test sequencer
Build catch log
